sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 68:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 68:1
items.html: The smaller part of the light of Malchut, meaning the reflected light which remains in her as her own existence is called “a small spark.” In the lights it is called a record. (Part 3, Chapter 5, item 5)
